goal: Record guarded FIM route decisions as compact DecisionRecorded state payloads so route execution has durable lineage without storing the full prompt.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek fim-route --enable --record --input 'complete src/deepseek.rs lines 2-3' --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Prompt-mode FIM routing can execute safely but leave no state decision evidence showing why FIM was accepted, which file/range was targeted, or which command path was delegated.
